vocab.meaning: nơi thoải mái như ở nhà mình
vocab.example: A local community library would be a home from home for many students who need a quiet place to study.

vocab.meaning: có khả năng xảy ra (dự kiến sẽ có)
vocab.example: I heard that a new sports complex is on the cards for our district, which is exactly what we need.

vocab.word: leave a lot to be desired
vocab.meaning: còn nhiều thiếu sót, chưa được tốt như mong đợi
vocab.example: The current recreational facilities in my area leave a lot to be desired, so more investment is crucial.

vocab.meaning: giúp ích được rất nhiều, có tác dụng lớn
vocab.example: Adding just a few more benches and trees in the neighborhood would go a long way in improving our quality of life.

vocab.meaning: niềm vui nhân đôi (một điều tốt đẹp bổ sung vào một thứ đã tốt sẵn)
vocab.example: We already have great shops, so a new art gallery would be the icing on the cake for this neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: thoát khỏi cuộc sống thường nhật (để nghỉ ngơi)
vocab.example: Public gardens provide a much-needed space for urban dwellers to get away from it all without leaving the city.

vocab.meaning: giúp ai đó luôn năng động, tỉnh táo hoặc sẵn sàng
vocab.example: Having more public outdoor gyms would definitely keep the elderly in our community on their toes.

vocab.meaning: phá vỡ sự ngại ngùng (giúp mọi người làm quen nhau)
vocab.example: Public squares act as a venue to break the ice between neighbors who otherwise would never speak to each other.

vocab.word: at the end of the day
vocab.meaning: suy cho cùng, xét cho cùng
vocab.example: At the end of the day, a city is defined by its public spaces rather than its private skyscrapers.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp với mục đích sử dụng, đáp ứng yêu cầu
vocab.example: The existing playground is no longer fit for purpose, so we urgently need a modern replacement.
